rationale: Review 1 identifies a real, verifiable finding: mapsTo_fiber, mapsTo_fiber_symm, and fiberHomeomorph have proofs that only use map_proj and work for any s : Set B, not just singletons — the eq_comm in fiberHomeomorph's simp call directly confirms unnecessary singleton specialization. Acting on Review 1 yields more general lemmas with simpler proofs; Review 2's claim that the lemmas are 'at the right generality' is contradicted by the proof structure.
